category_sources: Official GNU Bash page describes Bash as the GNU Project's shell and Bourne Again SHell.
source_facts.description says Bash is a UNIX command interpreter.
display_name_sources: Official GNU page heading is GNU Bash.
source_facts.description expands Bash as Bourne-Again SHell.
docs_sources: Official Bash Reference Manual is hosted under gnu.org/software/bash/manual.
Official GNU Bash page links online Documentation for Bash.
repo_sources: Official Bash manual references the Savannah cgit Bash source snapshot at git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/bash.git.
Official GNU Bash page directs development sources and project information to the Bash Savannah project page.
tags_sources: Official GNU Bash page describes Bash as an sh-compatible shell with command-line editing, history, job control, shell functions, and aliases.
source_facts.description identifies a UNIX command interpreter.
